title: selaginella arbuscula
intro: Selaginella arbuscula, also known as Desert Fern, is a type of evergreen, non-vascular plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella arbuscula include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, capsules, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
